author: Debbie Kidd
content: We had the rodeo bull for a family party last week.  It was fabulous!  Everyone had such a great time.  So much laughter! All my queries beforehand were replied to promptly by Joanne, they turned up exactly when they said  they would, we had the full 3 hours.  Explained everything to us on arrival.  I would most definitely use again, would recommend to anybody.  They certainly made our party a success!
